creator: yanagisawa@csg.is.titech.ac.jp
text:
p5-Mail-DKIM is a perl module for the users to use DomainKeys
	Identified Mail (DKIM) from Perl5.  This is depended on by dkimproxy*1,
	which is only the DKIM filter for the Postfix mail transfer agent.
	(I will submit PR for dkimproxy lator soon.)

	*1 http://jason.long.name/dkimproxy/

How-To-Repeat: 	n/a
